title: Defense Hierarchy
content:
{{Top|canon=Defense Hierarchy Council}} {{Organization |image= |name=Defense Hierarchy |type=Military command[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |founder= |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations= |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] **[[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]] }} {{Quote|Senior officers of the Defense Fleet belong to no family. They're stripped of family name and privilege and made part of the Defense Hierarchy in order that they may serve all Chiss without deference or prejudice.''"
"''So military command is merit-based, and not something that comes from Family connections?''"
"''Exactly. Officers are taken into the Hierarchy once they've proven themselves, just as the Ruling Families themselves select merit adoptives.|Force Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo and Maris Ferasi|}} The '''Defense Hierarchy''', also known as the '''Chiss military command''' or '''Chiss command''', was a military command of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]] that consisted of its [[Senior officer/Legends|senior officers]], including [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ar'alani/Legends|Ar'alani]]. The Defense Hierarchy selected [[Chiss officer/Legends|officers]] of the [[Chiss Defense Fleet]] to prove themselves in order to join their ranks in a manner analagous to how the [[Ruling Families/Legends|Ruling Families]] selected [[Merit adoptive/Legends|merit adoptives]]. Those promoted to a [[Senior officer/Legends|senior rank]] were stripped of family name and privilege and made part of the Hierarchy in order that they may serve all Chiss without deference or prejudice. {{Military-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |fi=Puolustushierarkia }} [[Category:Chiss military units]]
